title: Jetpiloter
writer: Basil Dawson, Bob Ramsing, Tage Vandsted
actors: Ebbe Langberg, Henning Palner, Poul Reichhardt
plot: Two brothers, Ras and Jan, has always been together during the long training to become jet pilots in the Danish Airforce. They both join squadron 793, where they will serve on active duty under the the young and very energetic squ...
